{"resourceType":"Bundle","type":"batch","entry":[{"resource":{"resourceType":"Parameters","parameter":[{"name":"coding","valueCoding":{"system":"http://va.gov/terminology/vistaDefinedElements/2-.08","code":"9"}},{"name":"valueSet","resource":{"resourceType":"ValueSet","id":"VSVFReligion","text":{"status":"generated","div":"
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  This value set includes codes based on the following rules:
